rulings.Case Title: DAVID LO et al VS. DANIEL S LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Defendant, Dan Lee, To Attend His Deposition And For Production Of Documents, For Reasonable Attorneys Fees, Costs, And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFFs DAVID LO, DANIEL LO, and ALICE LO's Motion For Order Compelling Defendant, Dan Lee, To Attend His Deposition And For Production Of Documents, For Reasonable Attorneys Fees, Costs, And For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to appear for deposition on a 4-day notice. Notice of deposition shall be served personally. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA NESTLE ET AL VS. ELIZABETH COURT, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Katherine Gardner, Andraya Harris, Kathryn Anderson, Amanda Smock, Erin Toohey And Alexis Vannis Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint For Damages And Injunctive Relief To Add Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFFs REBECCA NESTLE, MICHAEL SUENKEL, and KATHERINE GARDNER's Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint For Damages And Injunctive Relief To Add Defendants GRANTED. No opposition filed. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SENTINEL INSURANCE COMPANY, VS. DMS BUILDERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Restaurant Design Concepts, Inc.'S Motion For Summary Judgment Against Sentinel Insurance Company
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 13. Defendant Restaurant Design Concepts, Inc.'S Motion For Summary Judgment Against Sentinel Insurance Company continued to January 31, 2018 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THEDA FUNG VS. SUSANA MANCIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANTs SUSANA MANCIA and MGM INVESTMENTS 2015, LLC's Motion To Set Aside Default GRANTED. Defendants to file and answer no later than January 23, 2018. Vitcor Toscano is to compensate Plaintiff/Plaintiff's counsel for the costs and fees incurred in obtaining the default and opposing this motion (e.g. submitting and service request for default, preparing points and authorities, etc.) Payment shall be remitted within 20 days of receipt of invoice from Plaintiff. Plaintiff shall submit an invoice to Mr. Toscano no later than January 29, 2018. Victor Toscano shall also remit $1,000 to the State Bar Client Security Fund no later than February 22, 2018. Victor Toscano to file a declaration of compliance with the Court order no later than April 6, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERNA SUE GRISSOM VS. JENNIFER ROSAIL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Or In The Alternative To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANTs STEFAN ADLER and JENNIFER ROSDAIL's Motion To Enforce Settlement Or In The Alternative To Compel Arbitration GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to enforce settlement agreement is DENIED. Motion to Compel Arbitration is GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERNA SUE GRISSOM VS. JENNIFER ROSAIL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 4. PLAINTIFF ERNA GRISSOM's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint GRANTED. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs In The Sum Of $10,140
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS LLC's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs In The Sum Of $10,140 continued to January 30, 2018 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE LEE VS. PATRICIA TELLERIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANTs DEYSIS CARACHE and EDUARDO ALVARADO's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer, except those issues previously overruled. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. VS. JINGRUI WANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declartion In Support Of Motion To Vacte Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT JINGRUI WANG's Motion To Vacte Default And Default Judgment GRANTED subject to (1) opposition; (2) Defendant posting $8,300 with the Court no later than January 23, 2018 by 4:00 p.m.; and (3) Defendant filing an answer no later than January 23, 2018 by 4:00 p.m.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RITA Q LAU VS. CHI TRAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 8. DEFENDANT CHI TRAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN YUDOWITZ VS. MART BAILEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 9. DEFENDANT MART BAILEY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer based on uncertainty is overruled. Demurrer based on failure to state facts re: liquidated damages (CC 1691 and 1951.5) is sustained with leave to amend. See Fox Chicago Realty Corp. v. Zukor's Dresses (1942) 50 Cal.App.2d 129 = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MALDONADO E. SUSANA VS. LA VICTORIA BAKERY CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 10. DEFENDANTs LA VICTORIA BAKERY CORPORATION and JAIME MALDONADO's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment GRANTED. Defendants to file answers no later that January 23, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. William Simpich to remit to Plaintiff's counsel $1,215 within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. William Simpich to file declaration of compliance within 5 days of compliance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; Proposed Response; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 11. DEFENDANT FREDY MORATAYA's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Hearing Required. Defendant and Gloria Hernandez to be present. The Court notes that opposition is filed by James Millar, who is not the attorney of record in this case. Substitution of Attorney to be filed and served by 9:00 a.m. on January 23, 2018. Defendant to be prepared to post $3,336.69. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHI QUAN WU VS. HENRY GUERRERO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; Proposed Response; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2018 line 12. DEFENDANT DANIEL GUERRERO's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Hearing Required. Daniel Guerrero and John Li to be present. Defendant to be prepared to post $17,600. = (501/REQ)
